name: fusion-agent-codex
description: Safe Codex plugin for the Fusion Agent CAD harness.

interface.shortDescription: Use the safe Fusion Agent CAD harness from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Fusion Agent Codex exposes a profile-filtered, mutation-safe CAD harness plus optional Codex-managed Fusion Data OAuth. It enforces typed CadSpec contracts, baseline-bound previews, no automatic replay after mutation dispatch, programmatic readback, endpoint policy, provenance, and auditable benchmark artifacts without exposing arbitrary backend code in the normal profile.
defaultPrompt: Inspect a Fusion target with programmatic evidence.
Plan and verify a bounded native Fusion change.
Run the safe-vs-fast mock benchmark suite.
